trainwatch.name: result:provenance-delta-dolphin-lexical-screen-null.public-report
trainwatch.description: benchmark: provenance-delta | caveat: Δ=0.0217 with 95% CI [-0.0217, 0.0652] STRADDLES ZERO, and this run used the default LEXICAL judge (a screen, not an independent LLM-judge), so it does NOT clear the no-overclaim gate. The validated headline lives in agi-proof/benchmark-results/published-results.json (dolphin Δ12.5% [5.6%, 19.4%], 2 judge families, 3 runs). Renamed from the misleading *-validated* filename 2026-06-23.

trainwatch.name: result:prompt-quality-heldout
trainwatch.description: caveat: heldout_v1 is the DEVELOPMENT pack the detectors were tuned against; floor-met here shows self-consistency, NOT generalization. An independent, un-tuned pack (v2) is the real held-out gate and is OPEN — do not call this a validated gate until v2 clears.

trainwatch.name: result:medicine-verifier-v2
trainwatch.description: caveat: v2 is independent of the self-checks and heldout_v1 but authored knowing the verifier's rules -> self-consistency on a fresh set, NOT blind generalisation; a truly third-party pack remains OPEN. | discipline: medicine

trainwatch.name: result:math-physics-external
trainwatch.description: benchmark: math_physics_external_style | note: answer-only is a deterministic harness-validation baseline (must score ~100%); illustrative, NOT a capability claim. Style samples, NOT the licensed MATH/GSM8K sets.

trainwatch.name: result:ladder-eval
trainwatch.description: benchmark: math_physics_ladder | note: answer-only proposer is a deterministic harness-validation baseline (feeds gold back); verified-correct counts are illustrative, NOT a capability claim. L6 abstains by design.
